prompt: Create a vertical anime-style street scene at a Japanese train station entrance, featuring one teenage girl standing in side profile in the foreground under a dark station canopy. The character has black hair tied in a high ponytail with a red ribbon, straight bangs framing her face, pale skin, and striking red eyes; she wears a crisp white short-sleeve school blouse with a small dark bow at the collar and a high-waisted dark pleated skirt. Her pose is calm and slightly wistful, arms relaxed at her sides, looking toward the bright city street to the right. The setting is Chuo Station, with visible bilingual station signage including “Chuo Sta”, “East Exit”, “Bus Terminal”, “Taxi Stand”, and “Coin Lockers”, plus a hanging directional sign and an analog clock on the right. The background shows a sunlit urban crosswalk, pedestrians, cars, mid-rise commercial buildings, storefront signs, tiled pavement, glass doors, pillars, and strong perspective lines leading out from the shadowed station interior. Use dramatic high-contrast lighting: deep black shadows inside the station, bright white daylight outside, long geometric shadows across the floor, and a limited monochrome palette with selective red accents in the eyes and hair ribbon. Style should blend detailed manga line art with cinematic noir photography, subtle film grain, slight chromatic aberration, sharp ink outlines, realistic architectural detail, and a moody urban atmosphere. No extra characters in the foreground, no smiling pose, no fantasy elements, no oversized accessories, and keep the composition centered on exactly one girl.
